title: poa bussmannii
intro: Poa bussmannii, also known as Bussmann's Meadow-grass, is a type of grass native to the mountainous regions of the southwestern United States. It has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Poa bussmannii include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as supporting the immune system and promoting overall well-being. Poa bussmannii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
